scripts.build: npm.cmd run build --workspace @yazko/web && npm.cmd run build --workspace @yazko/server
scripts.typecheck: npm.cmd run typecheck --workspace @yazko/web && npm.cmd run typecheck --workspace @yazko/server
scripts.verify: npm.cmd run typecheck && npm.cmd run build --workspace @yazko/server && npm.cmd run build --workspace @yazko/web
